# viettelidc_vks_cluster_block_storages (Data Source)

Data source for listing Block Storages attached to a VKS Cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u danh sÃ¡ch Block Storages cá»§a cá»¥m K8s
data "viettelidc_vks_cluster_block_storages" "storages" {
  cluster_id = "1477"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `block_storages` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--block_storages))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
